task: Move the banana to the top right of the table
raw:
Scene: banana, knife, cloth, pot, table
Step 1: reach(banana)
  affordance_region: the yellow banana on the left side of the table
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, banana, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, banana) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(banana)
  affordance_region: the yellow banana on the left side of the table
  contact: holding(banana) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(banana)
Step 3: transport(banana -> top_right_table)
  affordance_region: the top right area of the wooden table
  spatial: above(banana, top_right_table, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(banana)
  done_when: above(banana, top_right_table, 0.05)
Step 4: place(banana -> top_right_table)
  affordance_region: the top right area of the wooden table
  contact: surface_contact(banana, top_right_table) [completion]; released(banana) [completion]
  pose: stable(banana) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(banana, top_right_table) AND released(banana) AND stable(banana)
<END_OF_PLAN>
